license: All rights reserved on this index. Each record links to its original provider, who holds their own rights over the underlying data — this JSON is a convenience mirror of AmazoniaDB's curated list, not a redistribution of provider data.

records.title: GBIF Species Occurrence Data
records.description: A global aggregator of species occurrence records — museum specimens, citizen-science observations, and survey data — searchable and filterable to the Amazon basin.

records.title: speciesLink Network
records.provider: CRIA (Centro de Referência em Informação Ambiental)
records.description: A Brazilian biodiversity data network aggregating occurrence records for plants, animals, fungi, and microorganisms, enriched with images and land-use context for each collection site.

records.title: Hidroweb — National Hydrometeorological Network
records.provider: Agência Nacional de Águas e Saneamento Básico (ANA)
records.description: Station-level river level, streamflow, rainfall, and water-quality records from Brazil's National Hydrometeorological Network, run by the federal water agency.

records.title: BDMEP — Historical Meteorological Database
records.description: Daily historical weather station records for Brazil since 2000 — temperature, rainfall, humidity, and wind — searchable by station or map.

records.title: MapBiomas Land Cover & Use Maps
records.description: Annual land cover and land-use maps for Brazil since 1985, built from satellite image classification, tracking deforestation, fire, and vegetation change by year and biome.

records.title: TerraBrasilis — PRODES & DETER Deforestation Monitoring
records.description: Brazil's official satellite-based deforestation monitoring system, publishing annual clear-cut mapping (PRODES) and near-real-time alerts (DETER) for the Legal Amazon and other biomes.

records.title: FUNAI Indigenous Territories Geodata
records.description: Monthly-updated geospatial boundaries for Brazil's indigenous territories, villages, and regional coordination areas, from the federal indigenous affairs agency's mapping unit.

records.title: Terras Indígenas no Brasil
records.description: An independent, long-running database profiling Indigenous territories across Brazil — legal status, location, population, and news — maintained by a civil-society organization since the 1980s.

records.title: IBGE Cidades
records.provider: Instituto Brasileiro de Geografia e Estatística (IBGE)
records.description: Official municipal and state-level statistics for Brazil — population, economy, education, and health indicators — searchable by place, from the national statistics institute.

records.title: DATASUS TABNET Health Information
records.description: An interactive tabulation tool for Brazil's public health system data — mortality, births, morbidity, and health-facility records — built by the Ministry of Health.

records.title: ICMBio Protected Areas Geodata
records.provider: Instituto Chico Mendes de Conservação da Biodiversidade (ICMBio)
records.description: Official boundary data for Brazil's federally managed protected areas, including national parks and biological reserves, published under an open data license by the agency that administers them.

records.title: RAISG Amazon Maps
records.provider: Red Amazónica de Información Socioambiental Georreferenciada (RAISG)
records.description: Pan-Amazon geospatial data on indigenous territories, protected natural areas, infrastructure projects, and resource-extraction concessions, compiled by a nine-country civil-society network.

records.title: Geobosques — National Forest Monitoring Platform
records.provider: Ministerio del Ambiente (MINAM), Programa Nacional de Conservación de Bosques y Clima
records.description: Peru's national forest-loss and early-warning monitoring platform, covering the country's Amazon humid forest with annual loss maps, monthly alerts, and degradation layers.
